name: Kisoji Co., Ltd.
summary: Kisoji Co., Ltd. operates a chain of restaurants and taverns in Japan. Its restaurants offer shabu-shabu and Japanese cuisine, chicken dishes, grilled meat, wine, and Kyushu cuisine. The company was formerly known as Matsuba Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Kisoji Co., Ltd. in February 1974. Kisoji Co., Ltd. was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Nagoya, Japan.
